INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('WELCOME TO CLICKHOUSE');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('case INSENSITIVE TEST');
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, ['HELLO', 'world']) FROM (SELECT haystack FROM test_table WHERE haystack LIKE '%Hello%') AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT DISTINCT multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, ['HELLO']) AS result FROM test_table WHERE result > 0;
SELECT count(*) AS matches FROM test_table WHERE multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, ['case', 'test']) > 0;
